name: autodevops-build-agent-workspace
description: Versioned Agent protocol, SDK, repository inspector, and BuildAgent runtime for AutoDevOps.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @zhenfengxx/contracts && npm run build -w @zhenfengxx/agent-sdk && npm run build -w @zhenfengxx/repo-inspector && npm run build -w @autodevops/codex-prompts && npm run build -w @autodevops/integrations && npm run build -w @zhenfengxx/build-agent
scripts.ci: npm run check:secrets && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run check:packages && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org
